shared_target_training_note: Shared across all selectors, excluded from selection-only comparison. 1000 steps at ~2.9 s/step (global batch 128, avg ~512 tokens, FlashAttention-2 + gradient checkpointing + length-bucketed batching) = ~48 min wall on 8xA100 = 6.4 GPU-h.
calibration_note: 500 OOD calibration labels through the same high-fidelity routine as the offline stage (1.89 s/triple): 500 * 1.89 * 8 / 3600 = 2.1 GPU-h.
reuse_one_less_note: Run LESS once on a single source PEFT (L-r8-qv), then reuse the identical subset for every target. One-time cost equals one LESS run (31.6 GPU-h); marginal per-target cost is ~0 because the subset is not recomputed.
